title: Daoist Canon: Wang Chongyang: Lijiao Shiwu Lun (Section 3)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Wang Chongyang: Lijiao Shiwu Lun
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Wang Chongyang: Lijiao Shiwu Lun

translation.text: From the Wang Chongyang: Lijiao Shiwu Lun of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
